travel_time.notes: Offline fallback only. Straight-line distance is multiplied by a mode-specific detour factor, then divided by an assumed average speed.

amenity_travel_time.notes: For each area and amenity group, only the nearest candidate_count POIs by straight-line distance are considered before estimating travel time.
